notes_for_human_reviewer: OVER-READER FAILURE MODE — paranoid projection and cynicism, the symmetric counterpart to the under-reading novice. The learner manufactures motives the scene cannot support: Lena 'protecting her PMO budget', Tom/Priya 'in her pocket', the sponsor 'decided weeks ago', a plot to 'manage you and me out'. None of this is grounded — it's conspiracy presented as fact, so evidence_grounding FLOORS at 1. Register is contemptuous and cynical ('pure theatre', 'every supportive comment is a knife', 'trust no one') and it proposes putting the political read into the risk log — discretion_and_register FLOORS at 1 (cynical contempt + into-an-artifact, both hard caps). It also invents facts (the management-out theory). Tests whether the grader distinguishes seeing accurately from seeing conspiracies — over-reading is as much a failure as under-reading. Pre-set the soft dims at {2, tol 2}; the two floors hold it off pass.
